creator: peo@nethead.se
text:
Solved.

Problam was "push" statements in the server configuration, remains from some ancient config:

# Print your own welcome message
push "echo "
push "echo Welcome"
push "echo "

Versions up to and including 2.5.0 apparently just ignores this while 2.5.2 crashes. Removing the configuration junk fixed it.

So the idea that it crashes at a string comparison seems relevant but it would be better of course that the error is caught.

Per
